resultList.dtldesc: Discover this 1.5 BHK flat in Green Acres, Panvel, offering a blend of comfort and practicality. With spacious interiors and a well-thought-out layout, it provides an ideal home for small families or individuals. The location ensures seamless connectivity to major areas, enhancing convenience for daily travel.Property SpecificationsThis east-facing 1.5 BHK flat, situated on the first floor of a three-storeyed building, is well-ventilated and filled with fresh air, creating a pleasant and airy atmosphere. The flat is unfurnished, giving you the flexibility to design and personalize the space to suit your style.The layout includes a spacious hall, one large bedroom and one smaller bedroom, and two bathrooms. The kitchen is thoughtfully designed with a cooking countertop and sink, making it perfect for preparing meals efficiently.The interior features ceramic flooring, offering a sleek and easy-to-maintain finish. The bathrooms are well-planned, with one attached to the master bedroom and the other serving as a common bathroom. One bathroom is equipped with a western-style toilet, while the other features an Indian-style toilet.This flat offers a functional layout and a serene living environment, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a comfortable and practical home.FacilitiesFor added comfort and convenience, the property includes essential facilities such as open parking space, a gymnasium, one lift, security guards with CCTV surveillance, water storage, intercom, and internetWi-Fi connectivity.Water  Power SupplyThe property ensures efficient water and power management. Power is available for 2 hours in the morning and 1 hour in the evening, supported by an internal water tank with a 500-litre capacity, ensuring a 24-hour water supply for uninterrupted usage.LocalityThe location ensures effortless commuting with autos and buses readily available. Panvel Railway Station is just 8 km away, and the metro station is 20 km from the property. Prominent schools and hospitals are within a 4 km radius, while shopping malls and supermarkets are conveniently located within 8 km. The popular Swapna Nagari Film City is just 500 meters away, adding to the propertys appeal.This 1.5 BHK flat in Green Acres offers a blend of functionality, comfort, and convenience in a serene environment.
